# CivicScore

> Non-partisan, data-driven insights into U.S. congressional representatives' performance, sourced from Congress.gov and FEC.

CivicScore provides neutral civic analytics — voting records, bill sponsorships, committee work, attendance, bipartisanship, and campaign finance — without ideological labels or partisan framing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview and featured representatives.
- [U.S. Map](/map): State-by-state performance map.
- [Members](/members): All members of Congress.
- [Bills](/bills): Recent and tracked legislation.
- [Votes](/votes): Recent floor votes.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side member comparison.
- [News](/news): Congressional news feed.
- [Governors](/governors): U.S. state governors.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Platform overview.
- [Methodology](/methodology): How scores are calculated.
- [Data Sources](/data-sources): Where the data comes from.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
